ValidationRule.description: Unable users to create contact record for an account with no segmentation
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( Account.RecordType.DeveloperName = "Account_Prospect" , Account.RecordType.DeveloperName = "Account_Distributor" ), Account.00N5800000BO6UC = 0 , $User.BypassValidationRules__c = false)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please create a Segmentation before creating contacts for this client
